upasargachandrika.example_text: 'duzwabudDirayaM pApaH sadyaH SUle'vataMsyatAm' (tantrA0 116) avataMsyatAm=baDyatAm avapUrvasyEva prayogastaMsena kevalasya utpUrvasya vA alaNkAro hi kuRqalAdirbaDyata iti DAturbanDanArTamupasaNkrAntaH avataMsaH karRaBUzaRaM BUzaRamAtraM vA karRAvataMsaH Siro'vataMsa ityatra BUzaRamAtre prayogaH
'avataMsayanti dayamAnAH pramadAH SirIzakusumAni' (SA0 14) atrAvataMsaH karRaBUzaRamAcazwe avataMsayanti=avataMsI kurvanti
